name: Plateful
title: Calorie tracker
summary: A browser-only daily macro tracker — log meals, watch calorie and protein/carb/fat rings fill toward your goals, and keep quick-add favorites, all saved locally.
setup_questions: What's your daily calorie goal, and your protein/carb/fat targets (in grams or percentages)?
What should the app be called, and whose diary is it (a name for the header)?
Any dietary style to theme it around — e.g. high-protein, keto, vegetarian, balanced?
List 4–6 go-to foods or meals you eat often so we can preload them as quick-add favorites (with rough calories/macros).
photo_terms: healthy meal prep containers overhead flat lay
colorful protein bowl on wooden table
person logging food on phone at table
sections: Today dashboard with calorie ring + protein/carb/fat progress bars
Meal diary (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Snacks) with per-entry calories and macros
Add-food form with quick-add and serving multiplier
Favorites / frequent foods you can re-add in one tap
Date switcher to review previous days
based_on: MyFitnessPal / MacroFactor — a daily food diary with calorie and protein/carbs/fat macro tracking against custom goals.
